# Web Design Pros 365

> AI-optimized web development agency in Denver, Colorado. We build high-performance Next.js websites with full AI Visibility Stack: Technical SEO, AEO, and GEO.

## About

Web Design Pros 365 builds custom Next.js websites optimized for AI search engines. Founded by Corey Strange with 20+ years of web development experience, based in Denver, CO.

- [Home](https://www.webdesignpros365.com)
- [Services](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/services)
- [AI Visibility Stack](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/services/ai-visibility)
- [Portfolio](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/portfolio)
- [Pricing](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/pricing)
- [About](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/about)
- [Contact](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/contact)
- [Full LLM Context](https://www.webdesignpros365.com/llms-full.txt)

## Services

- Custom website design and development (Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript)
- AI Visibility Stack: SEO + AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) + GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
- Platform engineering: custom SaaS platforms replacing GoHighLevel
- WordPress migration to modern Next.js stack
- Sanity CMS integration for client-managed content

## Technology Stack

Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Sanity CMS, Vercel, Supabase, PostgreSQL, ACI Platform (patented)
